name: SonarCloud
description: Monitor SonarCloud for critical vulnerabilities and security hotspots in code for security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to SonarCloud
2. Go to My Account > Security
3. Generate a new token
4. Base64-encode 'your_token:' (token followed by a colon)
5. Paste the encoded string below

credentialFields.label: Base64 Encoded Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64-encode 'your_token:' (with trailing colon). Create a token in SonarCloud > My Account > Security

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Checks for critical and blocker vulnerabilities in SonarCloud

checks.name: Sanitized Inputs
checks.description: Checks for unreviewed security hotspots in SonarCloud
